Article Dispatch

Clean code: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship

Deep work is the ability to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task. coined by the author on his popular blog Study Hacks, deep work will make you better at what you do, let you achieve more in less time and provide the sense of true fulfilment that comes from the mastery of a skill. In short, deep work is like a superpower in our increasingly competitive economy.

Ali N. Parizi 9 Oct 2022 book programming engineering management ethical-engineering
arrow_back Back to library Permalink north_east

Book Review Snapshot

0/5

Deep work is the ability to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task. coined by the author on his popular blog Study Hacks, deep work will make you better at what you do, let you achieve more in less time and provide the sense of true fulfilment that comes from the mastery of a skill. In short, deep work is like a superpower in our increasingly competitive economy.
